JavaScript testing tools, Git ignore settings, snapshot creation, CLI compiler, and code transformation scripts.

## Folders
- **[tests](tests/README.md)**: JavaScript testing tools and configurations with ESLint, Mocha, and Unroll, plus emoji and syntax test files.

## Files
- **[.gitignore](.gitignore.md)**: Specifies files and directories for Git to ignore, including `js_tooling.js` and `node_modules`.
- **[_js_tooling.js](_js_tooling.js.md)**: JavaScript functions for creating snapshots, patching PBPack files, and handling JerryScript interactions.
- **[generate_snapshot.js](generate_snapshot.js.md)**: Tool for creating JavaScript snapshots to reduce build-time dependencies in automated processes.
- **[index.js](index.js.md)**: Node-based CLI for compiling JavaScript to bytecode and patching PBPack or PBW files.
- **[js_tooling_port.c](js_tooling_port.c.md)**: Functions for handling JerryScript snapshots, error messages, logging, and fatal errors.
- **[package.json](package.json.md)**: Configuration for a Node.js-based CLI compiler with dependencies.
- **[test.html](test.html.md)**: A benchmark page for testing JavaScript code execution in browsers, using embedded scripts.
- **[transform_js.py](transform_js.py.md)**: Script to modify JavaScript code for compatibility with Emscripten when cross-compiling JerryScript.
